decision_summary.rationale: Terminate first to avoid unnecessary costs while the instance is stopped.

cost_report.waste_evidence: Stopped for 42 days with network_out_bytes_avg of 31 bytes.

llm_response.group_summary: All instances have been evaluated and actioned. The execution order ensures that dependencies are addressed first. Total savings are significant, with the termination of i-b501 being the most impactful.

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: Reports are resource-specific with concrete metrics, but cost figures have inconsistencies (i-b503 current_monthly_cost 29.76 vs savings 30.05), rationales focus on execution order rather than why each action was chosen over alternatives, and risk assessment is thin for DOWNSIZE instances which carry real operational risk.
